diagrams.title: CI/CD Pipeline Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the continuous integration and continuous deployment pipeline from code commit to production
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the automated pipeline workflow and each stage's role

diagrams.title: Blue-Green Deployment Architecture
diagrams.description: Visualizes two identical environments with traffic switching mechanism
diagrams.purpose: Understanding instant rollback and zero-downtime deployment strategy

diagrams.title: Canary Deployment Stages
diagrams.description: Shows gradual rollout percentage increase from 1% to 100%
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing progressive rollout and risk mitigation approach

diagrams.title: Kubernetes Architecture
diagrams.description: Master-worker node architecture showing components and communication
diagrams.purpose: Understanding container orchestration and automated deployment at scale
